message:
chore: clippy lint sweep across fcp-testkit and fwc readiness module

Systematic pass addressing clippy lints and Rust idiom modernization
across the test toolkit and the fwc readiness/metadata module.

fcp-testkit/session_script.rs:
- Add Eq derive to MessageMatcher and ScriptStep (serde_json::Value
  does implement Eq in modern versions, making the old skip-comment
  outdated)
- Promote 16 builder methods to const fn (disconnect, send_message,
  expect_message, expect_message_containing, expect_any_message,
  expect_count, expect_silence, wait, assert_health, etc.)
- Add #[must_use] to to_jsonl()
- Replace `as u64` casts of duration.as_millis() (u128) with
  u64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(u64::MAX) to prevent silent truncation
- Collapse redundant step_phase() match arms into single arm with |
- Replace wildcard `use super::*` with explicit imports in scenarios module
- Migrate if-let-else chain in parse_duration() to map_or_else()

fcp-testkit/streaming_fixture.rs:
- Add Eq derive to StreamingAction
- Make send_json() const fn
- Add #[allow(clippy::needless_pass_by_value)] for Arc params in
  thread::spawn move closures
- Add # Panics doc sections to script() and enqueue()
- Fix SaaS to backtick-quoted in doc comment (doc_markdown lint)
- Migrate match-on-lock to let-else syntax
- Replace wildcard imports with explicit imports in streaming_scenarios
- Same u128->u64 truncation fix in duration_ms_serde

fcp-testkit/webhook_helpers.rs:
- Add # Panics doc section to mount_json()
- Use Option::is_none_or() (stabilized in Rust 1.82) instead of
  match-on-Option for retry status check

fcp-testkit/database_helpers.rs:
- Add Eq derive to FixtureSeedRecord, FixtureMutationRecord,
  CleanupVerificationResult, and SeededStatefulFixturePack
- Add # Panics doc section to to_json()

fwc/readiness.rs:
- Add Eq derive to MetadataField<T>
- Promote is_known(), as_known(), status_tag() to const fn
- Add #[must_use] to 20+ public methods (tag, explanation,
  is_authoritative, is_recoverable, is_success, exit_code_u8,
  compact_label, cli_symbol, severity_rank, etc.)
- Add # Errors doc sections to load(), load_for_connector_filter(),
  resolve_connector(), resolve_operation(), try_operation_info()
- Add # Panics doc section to field_repr() and operation_info()
- Reformat MetadataField doc comment for line-length

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
